import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
  mut last = "(none)"
  mut i = 0
  while i < lines.len()
    let line = match lines.get(i)
    when Some(l)
      l
    when None
      ""
    end
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      last = line
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(last)
end
